arxiv_hf.label: Research papers
arxiv_hf.topic_query: an arXiv category expression, e.g. 'cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG'

news.label: News stories
news.topic_query: comma-separated categories to EXCLUDE (max 4); empty means all

categories.Politics: (election OR congress OR senate OR parliament OR legislation OR "supreme court")
categories.World: (diplomacy OR "foreign policy" OR "united nations" OR sanctions OR treaty)
categories.Business: (economy OR inflation OR "stock market" OR earnings OR recession OR "interest rates")
categories.Technology: (technology OR software OR startup OR semiconductor OR cybersecurity)
categories.AI: ("artificial intelligence" OR "machine learning" OR "large language model" OR chatbot)
categories.Science: (research OR "scientific study" OR physics OR astronomy OR discovery)
categories.Health: (health OR disease OR vaccine OR medicine OR "public health" OR outbreak)
categories.Climate: (climate OR "global warming" OR emissions OR "renewable energy" OR wildfire)
categories.Sports: (sport OR sports OR championship OR tournament OR playoff OR Olympics OR league OR match)
categories.Entertainment: (film OR movie OR music OR celebrity OR "box office" OR streaming OR singer OR actor)
categories.Crime & Justice: (trial OR lawsuit OR investigation OR verdict OR fraud OR indictment)
categories.Conflict & Security: (war OR military OR conflict OR ceasefire OR "armed forces")

music.label: Music discovery (tracks)
music.topic_query: comma-separated seed artists and/or genres to learn taste from, e.g. 'Radiohead, Khruangbin, shoegaze'
music.needs: a Last.fm API key set on the pipeline (LASTFM_API_KEY valve)
